Release notes for Pebble Firmware v1.9.0 and v1.9.1, detailing new features and bug fixes.

# Purpose
The release notes document the updates and bug fixes for PebbleOS versions 1.9.0 and 1.9.1 for the Pebble SmartWatch. Version 1.9.0 introduces new features such as enhanced watch-face interaction, a new watch-face selector, Facebook notification support for Android devices, and a new text layout engine. It also addresses several bugs, including issues with backlight behavior, Bluetooth settings, call labeling, text alignment, and airplane mode resets. Version 1.9.1 is a subsequent update that resolves a critical bug affecting device responsiveness after shutdown, which was present in earlier versions 1.8.x and 1.9. These notes provide users with a clear understanding of the improvements and fixes included in these firmware updates.
